changes.old: rabid *austriacante* and I was well aware
changes.new: rabid *austriacante* — a zealous partisan of Austria — and I was well aware
changes.reason: Restores a gloss for the untranslated term; Claude's draft glosses austriacante as a zealous partisan of Austria so the meaning is not lost to the English reader.
